message:
franken_numpy: add StringArray.slice for np.strings.slice parity

Implements Python-style string slicing on StringArray elements:
- Supports start, stop, step parameters
- Handles negative indices (wrap from end)
- Handles None defaults correctly per step direction
- Supports both positive and negative step values

Also adds 5 unit tests covering basic, from-start, to-end,
negative indices, and step cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
